title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0085 1 - 3 High Street, Bristol, BS9 3DR
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  1 High Street Ltd  Site address:  1-3 High Street, Bristol, BS9 3DR  Description of proposed development:  Change of use of first floor ancillary commercial accommodation to 2no. self-contained flats. Erection of a second-floor extension to provide 2no. self-contained flats. Reconfiguration of ground floor to provide a 107sqm commercial unit, including new shopfront, and refuse/recycling and cycle storage.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 3 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 4 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 28 April 2025   Decision date 19 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 213 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 4 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0085 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     250209 13HS COVER LETTER 2F  (PDF, 3.04 MB, 8 pages)  690-PLA-001-A_EXISTING SITE LOCATION PLAN  (PDF, 83.3 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-002-A_EXISTING SITE PLAN  (PDF, 124 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-010-A_EXISTING GROUND FLOOR PLAN  (PDF, 279 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-011-A_EXISTING FIRST FLOOR PLAN  (PDF, 253 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-013-A_EXISTING ROOF PLAN  (PDF, 266 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-020-A_EXISTING FRONT ELEVATION  (PDF, 299 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-021-A_EXISTING REAR ELEVATION  (PDF, 467 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-030-A_EXISTING SECTION AA  (PDF, 214 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-610-A_PLANNING - PROPOSED SITE PLAN  (PDF, 349 KB, 1 page)  690-PLA-611-A_PLANNING - PROPOSED GROUND FLOOR PLAN  (PDF, 361 KB, 1...
